title: Senior Software Engineer - Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
